1. The arrows are not properly positioned - they appear as short horizontal lines rather than connecting the centers of the circles.
2. The spacing between elements doesn't match the required specifications (first circle at x=320px, last at x=1600px).
3. The highlighted step 5 should have a 3px solid #ff
